data.body: EPIC COMPLETE. ALL 19 stories landed on origin/main (Gerrit 537-555 + 559, all MERGED). 18/19 certified-closed (signed both attestations). 5f39 closed UNSIGNED (force-close) - code complete+landed+code-verified, only [operator-attested] AC3 (GitHub secrets/vars + Jira project + canary-run URL) pending operator. Epic bf50 closed UNSIGNED reflecting the same. Discovered bug 4c6c (fsck TOCTOU) filed+linked. Landing won the FF race after 2 rebase cycles; flakes rechecked (549 macos signal, 538 int int(''), 547 graph-perf timing). HANDOFF: operator must configure 5f39's repo secrets/vars + dedicated Jira project + record a green canary workflow_dispatch run URL, then reopen->reverify 5f39 + re-close epic to earn signatures.
